Configuration for GDB to set charset and source Python path and tools scripts.

# Purpose
The script sets the character set to `US-ASCII` to address a known issue with `libiconv`. It then adjusts the Python path by sourcing the `gdb_python_path_fix.py` script to ensure compatibility with the system Python linked to GDB. Finally, it sources additional GDB scripts, `gdb_tintin.py` and `gdb_printers.py`, to load necessary tools for debugging.
